195 Pages · 250 API Endpoints · All buttons, modals, links, cards extracted from source

Button handleApproveClick(shop)} style=} > Approve Shop

Approves the pending item, updates status, and triggers notifications.

Button handleReviewDetails(shop)} style=} > Review Details

Opens a detailed view/modal for the selected record.

Button setDenyConfirmId(shop.id)} style=} > Deny

Rejects the pending item. Should update status and log the action.

Button setShowDetails(false)} style=} > Close

Dismisses the current modal or action without saving.

Button handleApproveClick(selectedShop)} style=} > Approve This Shop

Approves the pending item, updates status, and triggers notifications.

Button setDenyConfirmId(selectedShop.id)} style=} > Deny Application

Rejects the pending item. Should update status and log the action.

Button } disabled= style=} > Cancel

Dismisses the current modal or action without saving.

Button handleDeny(denyConfirmId)} style=}>Deny

Rejects the pending item. Should update status and log the action.

Button setDenyConfirmId(null)} style=}>Cancel

Dismisses the current modal or action without saving.

Button setApproveResult(null)} style=}>Done

Approves the pending item, updates status, and triggers notifications.

Button setPendingMsg(null)} style=}>×

Interactive button — verify it triggers the expected UI change or API call.
